Interface GoalChooserFactory<P extends ProofObject<G>, G extends ProofGoal<@NonNull G>>

All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultGoalChooserFactory, DepthFirstGoalChooserFactory, SymbolicExecutionGoalChooserFactory
public interface GoalChooserFactory<P extends ProofObject<G>, G extends ProofGoal<@NonNull G>>
Interface to be implemented by builders returning a goal chooser.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    GoalChooserFactory<P,G>
    copy()
    returns a clone of this goal chooser
    GoalChooser<P,G>
    create()
    returns a new goal chooser
    String
    name()
    returns the name of the goal chooser
